item.name: INST-LST-PAGE-TOKEN-GARBAGE — List с garbage page_token → 400 InvalidArgument
INST-LST-FILTER-GARBAGE — List с garbage filter syntax → 200 или 400
INST-LST-FILTER-UNKNOWN-FIELD — List с filter на unsupported field → 200 или 400
INST-METHOD-DELETE-LIST — DELETE на List endpoint (без id) → 404/405/501
INST-CR-VAL-EMPTY-BODY — Create instance с пустым body → 400 (project_id required)
INST-CR-VAL-MALFORMED-JSON — Create instance с malformed JSON → 400/415
INST-CR-SEC-SQLI — Security probe: sqli в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-CR-SEC-UNION — Security probe: union в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-CR-SEC-XSS — Security probe: xss в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-CR-SEC-CMD — Security probe: cmd в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-CR-SEC-PATH — Security probe: path в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-CR-SEC-LONGPAYLOAD — Security probe: longpayload в name → handled, без 500/leak
INST-LST-SEC-FILTER-SQLI — Security: SQL injection в filter → не 500
INST-ANI-AUTHZ-NF-SYNC — AttachNetworkInterface несуществующего instance → sync 404 NOT_FOUND
